Böse.title: Against a Fuse
Böse.about:
All tracks were recorded live by Homeless Recordings in Oppeln, west Poland.
Piano was add few hours later. (yes, we use a VST Fender Piano on "Riders", it's obvious)
D - guitar
R - bass
M - drums, keys
Cover art: Le Canard,  freeimages.com
Get on CD from:  oziumrecords.com/shop/details/1536
Böse.credits:
released July 9, 2014
Our guitarist say that his guitar is too soft and clean...
So we let it be loose in the mix. His Laney is a crazy amp that give us a thrill and wheeze every time we play.

Böse.title: Apocalypse of the third dimension
Böse.about:
Recorded November 3 a.d. 2022 in the hot Böse's underground castle in Opole.
Are you ready for the space apocalypse?
Sit back and start your journey through the lost third dimension.
The universe is not what it seems. It's more! In the nooks and crannies of stardust there is undiscovered space. Only the chosen ones can get there. Will you be one of them?
Böse.credits:
released November 29, 2022
Recorded by three riders of Cosmic Apocalypse:
Great Daro Soundblaster - guitar
Magnificent RPA Crushmaker - bass
Slim Snake Martin Thunderbeat - drums, midi

Böse.title: Moonsnake
Böse.about:
Böse's secret archive reveals its secrets...
We don't remember much from this session. One thing is sure: there were lot of smoke inside our session room. We liked sometimes to change instruments, switch between guitars, bass and drums. This day we had two nice guitars, so we decided to play with two guitars. Plan was, that we will make some new project. Hammond was recorded month later and by the week the first mix was done. But then we made another Böse session and forget about this...
Five years later session was accidentally found on one of our computers. It was February 2020. We were try to remind some details from this session, but all that we know is, that we had a great time :)
Session is not possible to edit now, so we have only some WAV files from the past mix. Enjoy our noise!
Böse.credits:
released March 12, 2020
Recorded 13th May 2015 in Hot Castle, Opole, Poland.
Hammond added 30th June 2015.
Played by:
Daro - guitars
RPA - guitars, bas??
LeC - drums, harp

Böse.title: Stop thinking, make NOIZE!
Böse.about:
ENJOY THE NOIZE!!!
Recorded by Lost Track Records 10 February 2015 in Böse's Hot Room
Noizemakers: Daro, RPA,LeC
Böse.credits:
released April 4, 2015
"Noise means any unwanted sound. Sounds, particularly loud ones, that disturb people or make it difficult to hear wanted sounds, are noise.
For example, conversations of other people may be called noise by people not involved in any of them; any unwanted sound such as domesticated dogs barking, neighbours playing loud music, portable mechanical saws, road traffic sounds, or a distant aircraft in quiet countryside, is called noise."
- Wiki: Noise
